steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage shows clam size and productivity increased even as harvesting pressure rose. The question asks what conclusion this supports about the gardening practices.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'contemporary Indigenous communities still use the practice': The passage doesn't address present-day use. ✗
  • Choice B — 'the approach was adopted from other Indigenous groups': Origin of the practice is never mentioned. ✗
  • Choice C — 'the approach effectively maintained clams as a sustainable food source': Larger, more productive clams under greater harvesting demand is direct evidence of sustainability. ✓
  • Choice D — 'harvesting pressure decreased over time': Contradicts the passage, which states harvesting pressure increased. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
